fields.name: name
fields.description: Source name in the form 2CXO Jhhmmss.s{+|-}ddmmss

fields.name: err_ellipse_r0
fields.description: Major radius of the 95% confidence level position error ellipse

fields.name: significance
fields.description: Highest flux significance across all stacked observations

fields.name: likelihood
fields.description: Highest detection log-likelihood across all stacked observations

fields.name: extent_flag
fields.description: Source is extended or inconsistent with a point source

fields.name: var_flag
fields.description: Source displays flux variability within one or more observations

fields.name: conf_flag
fields.description: Source may be confused with overlapping detections
